creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gian-Simon Purkert from comment #9)

No, it is not. Submitters may propose whatever changes they want, and it is the committers' obligation to review and commit the changes. I was simply asking if you are interested, and surely I could change it for you - though I cannot just "assign" someone as a maintainer unless they propose so.

Also, if you no longer wish to maintain the port, I will gladly commit the patch as-is, just let me know. Thanks! :)
